title: asteriscus graveolens subsp. graveolens
intro: Asteriscus graveolens subsp. graveolens, also known as Tackia graveolens, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Asteriscus graveolens subsp. graveolens include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared in various ways, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
